CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET

I am ready for more.

Why Start Your MBA Here

  • 1
    Choose from 14 in-demand specialisations, from Finance and HR to Data Science and Marketing.
  • 2
    Study 100% online with weekend live classes, so you keep earning while you learn.
  • 3
    Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
  • 4
    Real AI tools for business, plus mentor support, from your very first semester.
